function.name: _company_member_create
function.description: Add an existing account as a company member. The account must already exist in the system.

id.description: Account ID, username, phone number, or email of the user to add as a company member.

leaderIdList.description: List of leader account IDs for this member.

roleIdList.description: List of role IDs to assign to this member.

departmentIdList.description: List of department IDs this member belongs to (optional).

rowNumber.description: Display order number (optional). Lower numbers appear first.
